channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Park equipment dirty, 2nd May
item.description:
Hi, the play equipment between Waitrose and the bay shill needs a clean

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jessop Avenue, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 2nd May
item.description:
5 m long, 40 cm wide deep hole. Danger to motorcycles and car tyres/wheels getting stuck
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 2nd May
item.description:
Innsworth Lane Sports Ground, Longlevens. The 'What 3 Words' location is ///examiner.slopes.courage The ordnance survey map reference is: 51.883919,-2.213313 Council Litter Bin Ref: 0254

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 2nd May
item.description:
Unknown if police are aware

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 2nd May
item.description:
Large pieces of plastic and a sheet of broken glass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bicycle fly tipped in the river, 2nd May
item.description:
Bicycle in the river, next to Waitrose car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint James' Roundabout, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is NOT fixed, 2nd May
item.description:
This is an abandoned former cash point, formerly a phone box. GCC FixMyStreet has reported the issue as ‘fixed’. I attach a photo of the ‘fix’. This is not fixed by anyone’s standards. If GCC highways considers this fixed, it is time for a rethink. If it’s still a phone box, get BT to remove it. If it’s now street furniture owned by somebody else, get them to remove it. If GCC doesn’t have the power to remove it and can’t contact the owners, take enforcement action. You need to do better. Max Wilkinson MP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70-72, High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: For sale/let timber panel, 2nd May
item.description:
Obviously broken and left on verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can’t see the markings, 2nd May
item.description:
We can’t see the markings outside if the Mcdonald kingditch lane towards to big roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsditch Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs
